news.title: Trump says Iran's president asked for ceasefire, but U.S. wants Hormuz Strait open first
news.summary: The war began in late February when the U.S. and Israel launched strikes on Iran. The strikes caused economic turmoil and massive global energy disruptions.

news.title: Iran threatens Nvidia, Apple and other tech giants with attacks
news.summary: Iran's Revolutionary Guard has warned a number of tech companies with Middle East operations that they'll be considered "legitimate targets" The tech companies include Apple, Google, Facebook, Microsoft and Twitter.

news.title: Supreme Court hears birthright citizenship case with Trump in room
news.summary: Babies born in the U.S. are not entitled to citizenship if their parents are illegal immigrants or undocumented workers. Trump's executive order says babies born to illegal immigrants are not eligible for citizenship.

news.title: Private sector hiring totaled 62,000 in March, better than expected, ADP says
news.summary: Health care and construction continued to provide nearly all the momentum. Private sector employment growth kept pace, but private sector employment grew at a slower rate.

news.title: Visa launches new AI tools to manage the charge dispute process
news.summary: Visa's new tools are part of a larger push by major banks and financial institutions to incorporate AI into their businesses. Visa is one of many banks that are looking to use AI to improve their services.

news.title: ‘We’re aiming for a monthly income of $11,500’: I’m 64. I’ve $1.5 million in a 401(k). How do I time my withdrawals?
news.summary: “I plan to start collecting my Social Security of $4,100 at 68,” he says. “I’m going to be able to retire at 68.”

news.title: Boeing’s stock surges again after 7-year missile deal with the Trump administration
news.summary: Boeing’s stock still dropped 12.5% in March. Even with Tuesday’S bounce, the stock is still down more than 10% for the year.

news.title: U.S. manufacturers see best month in 2 1/2 years, but Iran war threatens to derail progress
news.summary: American manufacturers grew in March at the fastest pace in two and a half years. But the conflict with Iran added a new level of uncertainty just as the effects of the Trump tariffs were fading.

news.title: Nike’s price drop sets up a buying opportunity for long-term investors
news.summary: Nike’s price-to-earnings ratio is now well below its long-term average, but is still above that of the S&P 500.

news.title: Moon launches are having a moment. But can you make money off the lunar frenzy?
news.summary: Artemis II is ready to fly, as Musk, Bezos and NASA race to make the lunar economy a reality. The moon rush is on: Artemis II isready to fly.
